title: satureja montana subsp. pisidia
intro: Satureja montana subsp. pisidia, also known as the Cretan savory, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family and is native to the island of Crete. This herb has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja montana subsp. pisidia include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
